title: PVP 3 Lives
description: You have only 3 lives BUT you lose one ONLY if player kill you.
body:
This datapacks adds new mechanic.

Players now have only 3 lives.

BUT You lose life only if player is killed by another player.

For example.

If player is killed by creeper or tryed to swam in lava he will not lose a life.

But if player A kills player B, player B will lose a life.

If player have 0 lives he will be teleported to afterlife dimension with no way to come back.

Have fun!
